zh.lifeSummary: 當Annes ferch Owain於1239年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾利安德加時，她的父親Owain ap Bleddyn100歲，母親Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton99歲。她和Heilin ap Tudor至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annes ferch Owain于1239年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾利安德加时，她的父亲Owain ap Bleddyn100岁，母亲Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton99岁。她和Heilin ap Tudor至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Annes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Aonghas (based on the pronunciation), or a transferred use of the surname derived from this name or as a local name from the barony of Innes in Moray, named with Gaelic inis ‘island, piece of land’.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Annes ferch Owain was born in 1239, in Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Owain ap Bleddyn, was 100 and her mother, Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, was 99. She had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Heilin ap Tudor. She died in her hometown.

fr.Llandegai, Caernarvonshire, Wales: Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annes ferch Owain est née en 1239, à Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Owain ap Bleddyn, avait 100 ans et sa mère, Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, avait 99 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Heilin ap Tudor. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annes ferch Owain 1239 in Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Owain ap Bleddyn 100 und ihre Mutter Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton 99. Sie hatte mit Heilin ap Tudor mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annes ferch Owain è nata il nel 1239 nel Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Owain ap Bleddyn, aveva 100 anni e sua madre, Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, aveva 99 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Heilin ap Tudor. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Annes ferch Owainが1239年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアランデガイで生まれた時，父Owain ap Bleddynは100歳，母Efa verch Madog Goch of Suttonは99歳であった。彼女はHeilin ap Tudorとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annes ferch Owain(이)가 1239년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 랜데가이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owain ap Bleddyn(은)는 100세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton(은)는 99세였다. 그녀는 Heilin ap Tudor(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annes ferch Owain nasceu em 1239, em Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Owain ap Bleddyn, tinha 100 anos e sua mãe, Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, tinha 99 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Heilin ap Tudor. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annes ferch Owain родилась в 1239 г. в местности лландегеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Owain ap Bleddyn было 100 лет, а матери, которую звали Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, 99. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Heilin ap Tudor. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annes ferch Owain nació en 1239, en Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Owain ap Bleddyn, tenía 100 años y su mamá, Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, tenía 99 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Heilin ap Tudor. Murió en su pueblo.
